author: Josef
description: This plugin has not been manually reviewed by Obsidian staff. AI agent with 17 tools, multi-provider LLM (11 providers), RAG semantic search, PDF extraction, web search, and autonomous note creation.

manifest.author: Josef
manifest.description: AI agent with 17 tools, multi-provider LLM (11 providers), RAG semantic search, PDF extraction, web search, and autonomous note creation.
manifest.name: Copilot Personal

name: Copilot Personal

releases.author: JosefBelzer
releases.description:
🌐 Full English Localization
All ~156 user-facing strings translated from Spanish to English:

System messages and toasts (new Notice)
Settings UI labels, descriptions, placeholders
Header badges (🔒 Local/☁️ Cloud, ⭐ Pro/🆓 Free)
All 14 tool descriptions, parameter descriptions, error/result strings
Slash command prompts (/summarize, /translate, etc.)
Export chat labels (User, Assistant, System)
ToolRouter classification prompt now bilingual (English + Spanish examples)
🔒 Security & Compliance
GitHub artifact attestations via .github/workflows/release.yml (Sigstore-powered)
authorUrl fixed → GitHub profile (not plugin repo)
main.js minified: 3.86 MB (under 5 MB Obsidian Sync limit)
builtin-modules removed from dependencies
CSS !important replaced by higher-specificity selectors
Vault enumeration disclosure added to README
🧠 ToolRouter Bilingual
Fast-path now handles both create|generate|make|add|populate (English) and crea|genera|crear|añade (Spanish)
LLM classification prompt includes 12 English + 12 Spanish few-shot examples
No degradation for international users
🧪 Tests
15/15 test suites passing, 146/146 tests ✅
Test assertions updated to match English strings
📦 Build
main.js clean store build: 3.86 MB
TypeScript strict mode: 0 errors
⏳ Payment Gateway
Lemon Squeezy account is pending activation — Pro tier not yet available for purchase

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JosefBelzer/Copilot-Personal/compare/1.4.2...1.4.3

**Full Changelog**: https://github.com/JosefBelzer/Copilot-Personal/compare/1.4.2...1.4.3
releases.name: v1.4.3 — Internationalization & Obsidian Review Compliance

releases.author: JosefBelzer
releases.description:
### Copilot Personal v1.4.1
Advanced AI assistant for Obsidian featuring Agent Mode (17 tools), semantic RAG and a hybrid cloud licensing system.

#### Initial launch:
-
 11 LLM providers with native tool calling.
-
 Image extraction and advanced PDF reading.
-
 Pro licence validation via Cloudflare Workers.
releases.name: Copilot Personal v1.4.1 — Public Release
